item.title: Jimmys World trades a rare Mercedes
item.description: A rare Mercedes changes hands in Jimmy’s World. What surprising trade makes this deal stand out in the collector car scene?

media:content.media:title: Jimmys World trades a rare Mercedes
media:content.media:description: A rare Mercedes changes hands in Jimmy’s World. What surprising trade makes this deal stand out in the collector car scene?

item.title: What could happen to Buzz Aldrin’s Learjet
item.description: After years of sitting idle, Buzz Aldrin’s Learjet raises big questions. Will it be restored, repurposed, or left to history?

media:content.media:title: What could happen to Buzz Aldrin’s Learjet
media:content.media:description: After years of sitting idle, Buzz Aldrin’s Learjet raises big questions. Will it be restored, repurposed, or left to history?

item.title: Exploring an abandoned airplane
item.description: Jimmys World takes a closer look at an abandoned airplane and the story behind its $35K mystery.

media:content.media:title: Exploring an abandoned airplane
media:content.media:description: Jimmys World takes a closer look at an abandoned airplane and the story behind its $35K mystery.

item.title: Corrosion Everywhere: Can Buzz Aldrin Fly?
item.description: Jimmys World explores a corrosion-filled challenge and asks whether Buzz Aldrin can make it to the skies.

media:content.media:title: Corrosion Everywhere: Can Buzz Aldrin Fly?
media:content.media:description: Jimmys World explores a corrosion-filled challenge and asks whether Buzz Aldrin can make it to the skies.

item.title: WWI Museum Mystery: Reviving a Homemade Airplane
item.description: A homemade airplane tucked away in a WWI museum raises questions — can it be revived, and what story does it tell? This clip uncovers the mystery and the challenge of bringing history back to life.

media:content.media:title: WWI Museum Mystery: Reviving a Homemade Airplane
media:content.media:description: A homemade airplane tucked away in a WWI museum raises questions — can it be revived, and what story does it tell? This clip uncovers the mystery and the challenge of bringing history back to life.

item.title: Cheapest Twin Engine Plane: What’s the Plan?
item.description: Twin‑engine dreams don’t have to break the bank. This video explores the hunt for the cheapest twin‑engine plane and the plan to make it fly again.

media:content.media:title: Cheapest Twin Engine Plane: What’s the Plan?
media:content.media:description: Twin‑engine dreams don’t have to break the bank. This video explores the hunt for the cheapest twin‑engine plane and the plan to make it fly again.

item.title: Jimmy’s World: Elvis Jet Update
item.description: Elvis Presley’s abandoned JetStar has taken on a whole new life. Jimmy’s World reveals the latest chapter in its transformation — from forgotten relic to rolling tribute. With the original red velvet interior preserved and a new RV chassis underneath, this update shows how history, engineering, and rock ’n’ roll collide.

media:content.media:title: Jimmy’s World: Elvis Jet Update
media:content.media:description: Elvis Presley’s abandoned JetStar has taken on a whole new life. Jimmy’s World reveals the latest chapter in its transformation — from forgotten relic to rolling tribute. With the original red velvet interior preserved and a new RV chassis underneath, this update shows how history, engineering, and rock ’n’ roll collide.
